01-what-is-programming.title: Display Three Sentences
01-what-is-programming.description: Display exactly three lines about yourself using print()

staticChecks.failMessage: Write at least 3 lines of code

hints: Each print() statement outputs one line. You need at least three.
Make sure your text is inside quotes: print("your text here")
Try writing about your name, a hobby, and something you want to learn.

02-variables-and-types.title: Five Variables About Yourself
02-variables-and-types.description: Create at least 5 variables of different types and print them all
hints: A variable assignment looks like: name = "Alex"
Try using different types: strings ("text"), integers (25), floats (5.9), booleans (True)
Print each variable with a label: print("Name:", name)

03-input-and-output.title: Three Questions Program
03-input-and-output.description: Ask the user three questions, store answers, and display a summary

staticChecks.failMessage: Ask at least 3 questions using input()

hints: Use input() to ask a question: name = input("What is your name? ")
Store each answer in a different variable
Combine answers in your summary using f-strings: print(f"Hello {name}!")

04-conditions.title: Movie Age Restriction Checker
04-conditions.description: Check age and parental permission to determine if someone can watch a movie

staticChecks.failMessage: Get the user's age using int(input())

hints: Start by getting the age: age = int(input("How old are you? "))
Ask about parental permission for younger viewers
Use 'and' to check multiple conditions: if age >= 13 and has_permission == "yes":

05-loops.title: Sum of Numbers 1 to 100
05-loops.description: Calculate the sum of all numbers from 1 to 100 using a loop
hints: Start with a total variable: total = 0
Use range(1, 101) to get numbers from 1 to 100
Inside the loop, add each number to total: total += number

06-functions.title: Rectangle Area Calculator
06-functions.description: Create function to calculate rectangle areas

staticChecks.failMessage: Function should return the calculated area
